name: odometer

en.when_to_use: Use it for an old-style odometer/slot-machine digit transition where each digit column scrolls independently: after new Odometer({el}), call od.update(newValue). It suits counters, statistics, prices, or live metrics that need mechanical rolling digits; for a smooth numeric tween without rolling digits, use countup-js. You must link the matching theme CSS (its transition drives the 100% scroll), place that theme CSS inside shadow for a widget, and mount explicitly in JS (auto-init scans only light DOM and cannot reach shadow).
en.why_valuable: The mechanical feel of independently scrolling digit columns depends on coordinated .odometer-ribbon-inner transform transitions, ribbon stacks, DOM, and CSS; hand-written AI only tweens one number and loses the rolling mechanism. odometer's ready-made theme CSS fixes this behavior.

data_in.note: The real constructor input is { el, value?, format?, theme?, duration? }; this schema lifts value to the top level and groups the rest under options. Rolling depends on linking themes/odometer-theme-<theme>.css (without it, the number changes but does not roll). The theme name must match the loaded CSS.

schema.value: number -- target number; od.update(value) rolls to this value

options?.format?: string -- grouping/decimal format; default '(,ddd)' (thousands separators). Syntax uses ( ) , . and d
options?.theme?: string -- theme name, which must match the loaded theme CSS: 'default'|'car'|'minimal'|'digital'|'plaza'|'slot-machine'|'train-station'
options?.duration?: number -- rolling duration in ms; default 2000
options?.animation?: string -- 'count' forces step-by-step counting (default behavior selects automatically by difference)

spec.note: The digits' font-size determines dimensions (theme CSS controls font size/line height), not canvas. The container uses display:inline-block; do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要老式里程表/老虎机式逐位滚动的数字过渡(每个数位列独立滚动)时用它:new Odometer({el}) 后 od.update(newValue)。用于要机械滚位观感的计数器/统计/价格/实时指标;只要平滑数字 tween 不要滚位用 countup-js。必须外链对应 theme CSS(滚动 100% 由该 CSS 的 transition 驱动),widget 内把 theme CSS 放进 shadow 并显式 JS mount(auto-init 只扫 light DOM、够不到 shadow)。
why_valuable: 每个数位列独立滚动的机械感靠成排 .odometer-ribbon-inner 的 transform transition + ribbon 堆叠,是很琐碎的 DOM/transform + CSS 协同;AI 徒手只会 tween 一个数字、丢掉滚位机制。odometer 用现成 theme CSS 固定了这套滚动口径。

data_in.note: 构造真实入参是 { el, value?, format?, theme?, duration? };本 schema 把 value 提到顶层、其余归 options。滚动效果依赖外链 themes/odometer-theme-<theme>.css(不加载则只换数字不滚)。theme 名须与所加载 CSS 一致。

schema.value: number —— 目标数字;od.update(value) 滚到该值

options?.format?: string —— 分组/小数格式,默认 '(,ddd)'(千分位);记号用 ( ) , . 与 d
options?.theme?: string —— 主题名,须与所加载 theme CSS 对应:'default'|'car'|'minimal'|'digital'|'plaza'|'slot-machine'|'train-station'
options?.duration?: number —— 滚动时长 ms,默认 2000
options?.animation?: string —— 'count' 强制逐格计数(默认按差值自动选择)

spec.note: 尺寸由数字的 font-size 撑开(theme CSS 决定字号/行高),非 canvas;容器 display:inline-block,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 钉死 value 顶层 + options.format/theme;theme 必须与 boot 里加载的 theme CSS 一致。

uplink: display-only;od.update(newValue) 由消费 AI 调用推进,滚动结束的 'odometerdone' 事件如需外传由其直接接原生。

carriers.widget: conditional:必须把 theme CSS 放进 shadow 且显式 new Odometer({el}) 挂载(auto-init 只扫 document light DOM)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM + 外链 theme CSS,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: +esm 仅 default 导出(mt=Odometer 类)。odometer.js:this.el=options.el(必填),读 options.value/format/theme/duration;数位标记用 .odometer-digit/.odometer-ribbon-inner,滚动 transform 只定义在 theme CSS 里。themes/odometer-theme-default.css(及 car/minimal)HTTP 200;odometer.css 单独 404(基础样式内联在各 theme 文件中)。全局足迹:+esm 顶层含无条件 document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>Odometer.init());Odometer.init()=document.querySelectorAll(Odometer.options.selector||'.odometer') 只会自动包裹 light-DOM 命中,够不到 shadow(所以显式 JS mount 才安全)。UMD 尾部 `...==null?exports=c:window.Odometer=c`:window.Odometer 仅在无模块环境分支赋值,jsDelivr +esm 的 module shim 不走该分支,故 +esm import 下不设 window.Odometer。实例对自身 el 挂 MutationObserver 跟踪 innerText 变化。
